title: glandularia lilloana
intro: Glandularia lilloana, also known as Lillo's verbena or Verbena lilloana, is a flowering plant in the verbena family native to the mountainous regions of Argentina and Chile. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Glandularia lilloana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Glandularia lilloana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used topically as a poultice to treat wounds and skin irritations.
